title: Kirti College Merit List 2026

detail.title: Kirti College Merit List 2026
detail.short_info: Kirti College Merit List Dates 2026 are out. First Merit List released on 26 May 2026. Check important dates, document verification schedule and download the merit list PDF for all courses at kirticollege.edu.in.

content.text: Kirti College Merit List Dates 2026 have been officially announced. The First Merit List was released on 26 May 2026. Candidates can now check their status and complete document verification and fee payment. Kirti M. Doongursee College of Arts, Science and Commerce (Kirti College), Dadar West, Mumbai, has started the UG admission process for the academic year 2026-27. Admissions are based on merit of Class 12 marks under Mumbai University guidelines.

sections.heading: Important Dates for Kirti College Merit List 2026

content.text: Here is the direct link to download the First Merit List 2026:

links.label: All Courses (BA / B.Com / B.Sc / BAF / BAMMC etc.)

content.text: Place Direct Merit List Link Here after the overview section for best user experience.

sections.heading: How to Check Kirti College Merit List 2026

items: Go to the Undergraduate Admissions or Admission Notices 2026-27 section.
Click on the First Merit List link.
Download the PDF and search for your name or application number using Ctrl + F.
Check your rank and follow the instructions for document verification.
Original and photocopy of Class 12 Marksheet
